subject: A panicked dark-skinned humanoid figure with short dark hair flees down a corridor, mouth open in a scream, one hand raised behind to ward off a glowing blue ghostly figure visible through a doorway at the far end of the passage. The figure wears a heavy leather harness with buckles and straps over a sleeveless dark garment, with bracers on the wrists. A bedroll or pack hangs at the hip. Red light from another source bathes the scene from the right; the corridor itself appears to be made of fleshy, organic, wood-like material that has fused and warped.
description: A close mid-shot of a fleeing survivor framed against a long warped corridor. The figure is in mid-stride toward the viewer, body twisted to glance back over the right shoulder, mouth open in a shout or scream. The right hand is raised, palm out, in a warding gesture. A glowing pale-blue spectral silhouette stands in a doorway at the far end of the passage, lit from within by a bright cold light. The corridor walls undulate in organic ribbed shapes, lit lurid red from an offscreen right-hand source. The figure wears utilitarian survival gear: heavy buckled harness, bracers, bedroll. Their skin is rendered in cool blue from the spectral light wash, contrasted against the bloody red ambient on the corridor walls.
foreground: fleeing humanoid survivor in leather harness, hand raised in warding gesture, mouth open
background: warped fleshy corridor with a distant doorway framing a glowing spectral silhouette
